meta.source_name: Andries Brouwer — Bounds for binary constant weight codes A(n,d,w)
meta.trust_note: Targeting context ONLY — never a decider. Soundness of any bound claim stays with the exact-rational LP certificate and the Lean kernel.

sweep.scope: open cells, d in (6, 8, 10, 12), n <= 28, cheap-first

rows.status: no_valid_float (solvers crashed or floored below the known lb)

reading: D1 step 4 constant-weight reach probe. candidate = accepted float floor strictly below the Brouwer-snapshot ub and >= its lb; counts ONLY once the exact-rational LP certifies it (escalations[]). GREEN(candidate) -> surface to operator (independent snapshot re-verification before any announcement). DRY = 0 certified tightenings. Time-caps/solver failures are the honest scaling measurement. The snapshot is targeting context only, never a decider.
